description:
* Packaging for glassfish 5.0 web profile edition.
      * GlassFish Server provides a lightweight, modular server for the development of Java Platform Enterprise Edition (Java EE) applications. It is the Reference Implementation for Java EE. It delivers a
      highly productive platform for developing with the latest Java EE technologies.
      * Package location is the default for all chocolatey packages.
summary: Simple installer for Oracle's JEE reference application server called glassfish.  It is the web profile.
author: Oracle Corporation
